description_long: This is a dark gray, angular airplane with a futuristic, stealth-inspired design. The fuselage is boxy and robust, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a light blue-tinted canopy. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted mid-fuselage, with pronounced dihedral angles and no visible winglets. At the rear, the airplane has twin vertical stabilizers and two large, circular engine nacelles mounted on pylons, each with a visible exhaust nozzle. The landing gear consists of two large, fixed main wheels at the rear and a single, smaller nose wheel, all with open wheel wells. The surface appears metallic and matte, with subtle panel lines and a utilitarian, military-like appearance.
description: A dark gray, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and large rear-mounted engines. It features a forward, enclosed cockpit and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the boxy fuselage, swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and two large rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the sharply swept wings, dihedral angles, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the engine nacelles and landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, large circular engine nacelles, and the wide stance of the main landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with pronounced dihedral angles and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on rear pylons.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main rear wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and light blue-tinted window.
